decision: Refactored league header to match Figma design (Node 8443:42960)
rationale: Previous Button component did not match Figma spec. New design requires dark bg-secondary background, sport icon, Results text, match count badge, and column headers (Info|HT|FT|Status) with vertical separators.
changes: Removed Button component, replaced with custom div header
Added bg-secondary dark background (#1c1c22)
Implemented sport icon + Results text + Badge with match count
Added column headers section with black vertical separators
Column widths: Info=80px, HT/FT=auto with px-2, Status=130px
All text uses text-xs for headers, text-sm for main content
Header is clickable to toggle expand/collapse

decision: Verified column alignment between header and match cards

findings.header_structure: Left section (sport icon + text + badge) + Right section (column headers with separators)
findings.alignment_strategy: Header uses flex-1 for left section, fixed width (130px) for Status column to match match card Status width
findings.text_sizes: text-xs for headers, text-sm for content

decision: User identified incorrect hierarchy - Results header was on League level instead of Sport level
impact: Results header was appearing for each league instead of once per sport

decision: Moved sport header from league level to sport level
changes: Removed old header with text-xl and border-b
Added sport header with bg-secondary (#1c1c22), h-44px
Sport icon + Results text + Badge with totalMatches count
Column headers: Info (80px) | HT | FT | Status (130px) with black separators
Wrapped leagues in flex-col container
Added p-2 padding and gap-2 spacing
rationale: Sport header should appear once per sport, not per league

decision: Simplified league header to match Figma design (Node 8501:15470)
changes: Removed sport-level content (Results text, badge, column headers)
Changed bg-secondary to bg-card (#13131a)
Changed h-44px to h-36px
Left section: Flag emoji (14px) + League name (text-sm, flex-1, truncate)
Right section: Chevron icon (14px in 36px container)
Removed Badge import (no longer needed)
Removed cn utility import (no longer needed)
rationale: League header is subordinate to sport header, only shows league info

cause: Edit tool added new function instead of replacing
fix: Used Write tool to overwrite entire file with correct single function

details: User identified missing statistics (corners, yellow/red cards) from Figma design Node 8506:54054

decision: Added match statistics display between team name and score

implementation.position: Between team name and score, with gap-2 spacing

rationale: Figma design shows match statistics as part of match card info section

changes: Home team (mc:16967): FULLTIME_YC = 2, FULLTIME_CORNERS = 3, FULLTIME_RC = 0
Away team (mc:16967): FULLTIME_YC = 0, FULLTIME_CORNERS = 5, FULLTIME_RC = 1
rationale: Enable testing of statistics display with realistic values

user_feedback: Design nije dobar - trebaju HT i FT kolone odvojeno, ne samo jedan rezultat

decision: Potpuno refaktorisan match card da odgovara Info | HT | FT | Status strukturi iz Figme
changes: Info sekcija: Time (55px) + Separator + Team names + Statistics (flex-1)
HT kolona: 2 rezultata vertikalno (home/away halftime scores), 41px širina
FT kolona: 2 rezultata vertikalno (home/away fulltime scores), 41px širina, zelena boja za pobednika
Status kolona: Live event / Event ended (130px širina)
Dodati HALFTIME i FIRST_HALF ključevi za half time rezultate
Winner badge (žuta 2) prikazuje se samo u FT koloni pored pobedničkog rezultata
Statistike (corners, cards) ostaju u Info sekciji pored imena tima

implementation.winner_logic: Baziran na FT rezultatu, prikazuje žuti badge sa '2'
implementation.column_alignment: HT i FT kolone aligned sa headerom (Info | HT | FT | Status)

rationale: Figma dizajn jasno pokazuje 4 kolone: Info (tim+stats), HT (poluvreme), FT (kraj), Status
